insights: March 2026 has 5+ major titles (SBR, Frieren S2, Link Click S3, Oshi No Ko S3, JJK finale)

Common complaint: losing track of shows across Crunchyroll/Netflix/Hulu
Notion templates sell for $3-5; simple databases outperform complex ones
